subject: NSF Awards $576,061 to Combat Science Misinformation in Black Communities
body:
Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden
administration is giving professors at a public university over half a
million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and
misperceptions in black communities.

[alt_text]

[*****]
November 25, 2022

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61188&L=28490&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2NpZW5jZS1taXNpbmZvLWluLWJsYWNrLWNvbW11bml0aWVzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]

Keeping with its mission of combating disinformation, the Biden
administration is giving professors at a public university over half a
million dollars to fight science-related misinformation and
misperceptions in black communities. The goal is to counter inequity
and mistrust in scientific information and understand science
misinformation in black communities, according to the government
agency that is doling out the money for the research, the National
Science Foundation (NSF).

name: Will Rollins
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuP4UNAfuIdgf22n0Ftd4m0_BbVvHVk3qE5r94fY5NYXEHYnx-lIeuafcdoUTl41Z3_a4ThdcOO31q0Hm9sinTEQZj9hPpX6vtAeR7UU4IgafaM84_IRVxsWBie5NaIi0CmLlK1TccXEJCWMx8OSlLAXGWnSOVISjYfviemJavC7AuL0XVfnzV9VQR9EgTMKp3oNvZhNstmzUmWxS0yjXuDdcbxBG2Q4npeSHXF50cDjQscmk-zHflqu4ZUP7Pn0SKnxcB7oAerL2SZrQU9QFNz8rtx8uKEpi4By0CZolVNzhSGqPQr5oH2IWL_Ho21YGSxUAt3E4QTIdHjHEqqqTzqy1CY7nTnl_97PHkNUehf0ohcz8G7cbmOeV8iDWSGuDUX2ffeyckUOfpa69oU14-/3rh/eXd70wTlQ8eDOk8ihwpZrg/h0/S8sdMqAamL0BfqroXqH4F3F26lrDW4spE2c3ocKrx1g)
---
Peter, I hope you had a great Thanksgiving holiday. I wanted to take a moment to thank you and countless others for supporting this campaign over the past year. While the result of this election was not the outcome we’d hoped for, never lose faith that you made a difference. I urge you to look around at the amazing community we built over the past year. We found like-minded neighbors and forged friendships. We laid the foundation to continue working together towards our common goals. We also proved that ordinary Americans have the power to reject those who try to divide us. We are a community of Democrats, Republicans, and independents who came together to restore compromise, civility, and progress in the United States. This community will continue to grow. Thank you again for knocking doors, writing postcards, contributing money, making calls, sending texts, and doing everything you could to help us get out the vote. And thanks to my ever-supportive family and my incredible partner Paolo. Truly, I can’t express my gratitude for your help. It’s been my honor to stand with all of you. – Will Rollins
---
|
---

subject: let’s show the GOP how to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
We did not see the ‘Red Wave’ materialize Election Night, but we can still win the final battle of 2022 and make things better for America. |

---
Fellow American - _I'm not going to mince words._

We all wish that Republicans had won a majority in the Senate two weeks ago. We wish the 'Red Wave' had shown up and given us a big majority in the House of Representatives.

And while I'm pleased that we kept Senator Raphael Warnock below 50% on Election Day after he spent over $100 million, we all wish we could've beaten him outright.

**But here's the reality: we're in a runoff in Georgia for the final Senate seat in America.**

Fellow American, we have one last chance to get America back on the right track. You can help Republicans keep the Senate at 50-50 AND flip Georgia's Senate seat from BLUE to RED.

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: A New Direction.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
The era of one-party control in DC is officially over
_**One party control is over.**_ The Republicans have taken back the House and fired Nancy Pelosi, Peter!Americans made their voices clear on Election Day, and they are ready for a new direction... not the same old liberal leadership that has given us rampant inflation and sky-high gas and energy prices. We're committed to working **_for the people. _**That means opening the Capitol, requiring Congress to do the jobs they were elected to do, and prioritizing solutions that will actually help Americans, not far-left donors.[_**The American people are counting on us. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more to support our efforts?**_](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-r/) [>> Contribute $5 or More Now! <<](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-y/) Voters like you helped secure a Republican majority in Congress to stand up to Joe Biden and the Democrats. In difficult times like these, people want elected leaders who will fight for them.I'm ready to get to work for you to capitalize on our majority and deliver critical legislative victories for Republicans. Bringing down the cost of living, restoring our economy, supporting law enforcement to keep our communities safe, and respecting our veterans... **_that's the vision I have for Wisconsin and our country._**[__**Can I count on you to join me?**__](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-j/) Sincerely,
**Scott Fitzgerald** [Make A Custom Donation](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-t/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-i/)[](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-d/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-auijkhl-yuhdluddtl-k/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: Herschel Walker
subject: BREAKING: Raphael Warnock raised $52 million for the runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Raphael Warnock raised $52 million in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.
|

---
**BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Friend, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

Fellow American,

**Our campaign is low on money and needs to refuel.** We spent everything we had in the lead-up to Election Day, but Raphael Warnock still has gobs of money left over from the General Election.

He beat us to the airways with his first tv ad.

But we have good news, for now...

Team Herschel launched our first ad of the runoff, but the ad is not running on as many stations as we'd like to be.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsuq9etpuabbkr24eafqm3tihdn5fff30ihm6h30_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)
**We need to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours to expand how far and wide we run our new ad. Can we count on your immediate help?[Please watch our ad and then make a donation of $5, $50, or even $500 right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo802omjpu756p54bss9bi0q0rbef8vfhpfk3410_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)**

Herschel Walker is not just running to be the next U.S. Senator for Georgia. He is also running to be the 50th Republican vote in a tied Senate. If we flip this Democrat-held seat and win this runoff, _Herschel will help bring our country back from the brink._

Remember, Fellow American, we need your help to raise an additional $500,000 in the next 12 hours. **[Please make sure Georgia voters get to know the REAL Herschel Walker by chipping in ASAP.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztb8etn97bk2q394t1acapsf44241fml0su8fgk8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)**

Thanks,

[TeamHerschel.com](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbkh0smnv96kjnkaila9qgsammm3aelihbsjjpqg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)

P.S. After being bombarded by countless false attack ads in the General Election, Georgia voters need to see this ad about Herschel from people who know him best. **[Please watch, share, and chip in to help Herschel win on December 6th!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs2g8jps29u7q1sdn2t0d50l7icvcfrqjakh4bo0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)**

[** Donate Today -> **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4h9arlmas0d5qp2iur5im8o6mgo27cun2kgicf0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cdh2bs)

name: ICYMI News
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”
| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj6omt586me9f44aj32p6g0t1us66vrd31fcei2o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj4hddo72tnt4k18dlfb2637d17ld752b130dl8g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c9h2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6j6jne3q1kpjd7to592mhs4f3bohe6skh9k30gg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c9h2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0187%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=JF5Gw2yyApvaMjklYfymfg&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41959%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fESsItSt6%2bJ9pzKaSRPYbg&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41950%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iXs9MATgkfLPAGOut2QUSw&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41951%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hNsvqoGUVNMbE%2bo3dSANHw&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41952%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2fqwiy3%2f17WsgRsn%2fChU%2bg&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41953%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Ty5sh54np%2fjnTRulu4C7g&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c41954%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UrsJqgccSkWWRw0vCqDK8g&sysid=1)

Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots. Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union. Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit): Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy No Mass or Sunday worship service Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time Outrageously, there’s more. Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them. Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency). There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying. And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA. They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment! This can’t go on. I won’t allow it. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous. I can’t do it without you, Patriot. Thank you for doing whatever you can now. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship! Free the January 6 Protestors! ** Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy! At least one January 6 protestor has already died. And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: His life and future are in your hands
body:
And we're defending him in court!
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbqro17aofvffkhg7ocui60k2ps63821puqc63bo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl25drfhue8naulq5n74uuadkdjdfg74pplvfo0o_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj2cg0qhbug4fqcm9ueu20hp965fhki9qsvdir8g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6aeq9v86b1kb52spob3ofhjus49rd6vkg6nvki8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfdjqvh2mj59la80hc9detjiqpal2sg86eegqajg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zufm1b2jjkemje9a45jvsprqdhuv5nr49q1qvtn0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)[**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztsjm76d9k1kgbi4b2fnuer75hbhtglvha5qpdpo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4jia5gqhrnpll8qd8to4og9affhv35l3katm4hg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)
---

---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu74uvo5ntpbdc4q27en9t4svn38ia6nv0k1dr48_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2vneir0tc65m6vopr06uci6r18v8nkjcrubor20_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6cjh2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They warned: “Don’t tell your parents…”
body:
| | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. _Wouldn 't you be furious?_ I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. **Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. ** [**Will you please make an urgent, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty and help us fund this lawsuit while generating a nationwide wave of support for Jessica and her daughter?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963646:6jNHZYGN1:m:1:3331421248:5854A52D3AFEDB975D2F39899B4424C8:r) I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? **_They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." _** "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." **These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. ** [**Which is why I 'm asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today if you agree with our lawsuit against these teachers, the principal, and the Spreckels Union School District.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963646:6jNHZYGN1:m:1:3331421248:5854A52D3AFEDB975D2F39899B4424C8:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. [**That 's why, I hope you'll also consider making a generous donation of $25, $35, $50 or $100 to help fund our case. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963646:6jNHZYGN1:m:1:3331421248:5854A52D3AFEDB975D2F39899B4424C8:r) The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- _unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases._ Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. **Ours is a legal one.** And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law?**[Join the fight with a generous donation of $35 or more so the courts, the plaintiffs, the defendants -- everybody -- will know how big the nationwide movement to protect kids has grown. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963646:6jNHZYGN1:m:1:3331421248:5854A52D3AFEDB975D2F39899B4424C8:r)**** ** No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. **[Which is why I hope we can count on your generous tax-deductible donation of $25, $35, $50 or more to help us win this lawsuit and others like it. Thank you!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963646:6jNHZYGN1:m:1:3331421248:5854A52D3AFEDB975D2F39899B4424C8:r) **

clean_body: | | | Peter, Imagine that you've just been called into the middle school principal's office to have a "serious talk" about your daughter. You're worried -- is it her grades? Her behavior? Is she hurt? Instead, the principal tells you that your daughter -- your 12- year-old little girl -- is now your son. That behind your back, the school has been "educating" your preteen daughter \-- for months, in total secret -- about how to "transition" her gender. And they instructed her to keep it hidden from you...because you "can't be trusted." That you, her parent, are not "safe." But now, she has a new name. New pronouns. A new bathroom. And you just need to accept it. Wouldn 't you be furious? I know I would be! So it's no surprise that's exactly how Jessica Konen felt when she was called into her daughter's California middle school and this nightmare played out in real life. Now, Jessica is fighting back and suing the school district -- plus the principal and the two teachers who "groomed" her daughter -- and she needs your help to win justice in a court of law. I hope you will, because as infuriating as that story is, the details are even more outrageous. Would you believe Jessica's daughter was just eleven when she was lured by these teachers to join their so-called "Equality Club"? They first convinced this little girl that she was bisexual. Then, as they sunk their hooks deeper, they told her -- not long after her twelfth birthday -- that really, she was probably "transgender." "But don't tell your parents!" they warned. In fact, they operated the entire club under a cloak of secrecy. No permission slips were signed. No attendance was taken. No membership lists were kept. Meetings were scheduled for lunchtime -- instead of after school, like other clubs -- so parents wouldn't begin to wonder where their kids were. What were they hiding?? If you've followed the growing nationwide problem of teachers "grooming" young, confused students -- you probably know some of the predatory tactics these teachers often use to manipulate vulnerable children into believing they're "transgender" or "non-binary." This case was no exception. In fact, these two teachers even let some of their secrets slip on leaked audio from a Teachers Association conference! Discussing how they managed to target so many new recruits for their club, one of the teachers confessed: "We totally stalked what they were doing on Google." These teachers zeroed in on confused and troubled students and -- instead of helping them -- they further filled these children 's heads with lies and more confusion. My name is Harmeet Dhillon. I'm a lawyer, and the founder of the Center for American Liberty. You may recognize me from one of my many Fox News appearances with Jessica Konen or other plaintiffs my nonprofit organization is representing in lawsuits against government officials who violate Americans' rights. Today, I'm asking you to join us in support of Jessica's case. It's clear that the defendants deprived Jessica Konen of her civil rights as a parent, that they conspired to do so, and that they inflicted emotional distress on both Jessica and her daughter. Those legal claims and more are at the heart of our lawsuit. I believe our evidence lays out a very strong case. But you must remember, this is a California school district and the defense's case will be funded by the government. And it will pay whatever it takes to defend leftist ideologies. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit organization, meaning we receive no government funding -- unlike the deep-pocketed defendants in most of our cases. Because of this, we rely on support from generous Americans who can recognize an injustice and want to see it set right. Our nonprofit status also means your donation is tax-deductible to the fullest extent allowed by law. We've seen evidence of this type of "grooming" at schools across the country. And it's not just in places like California! Dangerous teachers like this are unfortunately in classrooms across the country. Thankfully, the tide seems to be turning against them. Earlier this year, Governor DeSantis outlawed teachers from having these sexualized conversations with their young students. And elsewhere, parents have gotten involved with their local school boards to run for office and change policies that have put radical gender ideology ahead of student safety or parental rights. Those are political solutions. Ours is a legal one. And I believe that, in order to fully purge this predatory behavior from our schools, we need to fight this battle on all available fronts. Won't you please help us win this fight in a court of law? No parent should have to endure what Jessica Konen and her daughter did, and it's up to us to use the full force of the law to make sure no teacher is allowed to get away with this again. Thank you, | | | | | P.S. Winning this case will not only get justice for the Konen family, but also strike a blow against these dangerous school policies nationwide. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn87u6rjqmbrm5ls01usome5b6asd3nduatqrf08_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5qpfst6ehqicqffbj66i35tcbpbt73dba3uuc1g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z06lp0iol6fd1n48os64kt56t2v0gh9p0ve050lg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm0ob6c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

body:

Thank you for all that you did.

---

Dear Friend,

Words cannot adequately express my gratitude for your continued support of Republican candidates over the last two years. You kept us in the fight when it mattered most - when the very fate of the nation was on the line. I know it hasn't been easy. The economy has been rough, but your loyalty and support never waivered. Our victory in the House is a testament to the heart and will of grassroots patriots across the nation; I will never forget this show of American grit and indomitable character.

Our frontline candidates faced vicious uphill battles, weathered countless attacks, and survived millions of dollars of Democratic fundraising surges - because of YOU. Friend, you are DIRECTLY responsible for Republicans retaking the House.

Without you, none of this would have been possible. As a token of our appreciation, I would like to offer you a **[free exclusive victory gift here:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zidf86c08paro7l5vjclb6dmelm6ddhi8c7h1008_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm2o31c5h2bs "free exclusive victory gift here:")**

name: Kari Lake
subject: We won’t bend or break
body:
Keep the fight going [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7581%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=aE9oXieIaY8k7lC7a9w39g&sysid=1)
Keep the fight going

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77294%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g5MzNHKqJgrQTGREDDZvrg&sysid=1)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Today, early voting in Georgia’s Senate runoff begins. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. Can you help us shift the political landscape dramatically in favor of Joe Biden’s agenda?
body:
voting starts today
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te1e00ec3-cd47-46a2-b079-015b1c09bb25/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_Today is the beginning of early voting in Georgia so we can return Senator Warnock to Washington! Can you rush $5 to the Warnock campaign to get five more voters to the polls today?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca5258cf-1a83-4449-8d87-ad376030b443/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Today, Saturday, November 26th, early voting starts. We want to make as many calls, knock on as many doors, get as many Warnock supporters to the polls as possible to hold onto this crucially important Senate seat. _** **_Healthcare, abortion rights, further action on regulating guns, paid family & medical leave, a $15 min wage & preventing a potential climate catastrophe are just some of the many issues on the ballot in Georgia. _** **_We must get his back--first, make a plan to vote right away if you live in Georgia!-- by rushing him the resources to turn out voters once the early voting period begins. As we told you previously, it costs .98 to vote in Georgia. Our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters!_**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Georgia Senate runoff voting starts TODAY!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb82a45b-8988-4d42-aaf4-a1f43c475d98/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | This election could secure the Democratic majority and keep the grandstanding Sen. Joe Manchin from interfering with Joe Biden’s agenda. Again, our goal today is to start the early voting period with a bang by getting Senator Warnock $5,000 to turn out over 5,000 voters! **_Your support is so important right now, because Raphael Warnock isn’t calling up big, corporate lobbyists to help him fight off everything the Republicans have left. He’s asking ordinary citizens, regular voters, working families, to support his campaign and his vision of a better country for all of us._** **_This is our chance to come together and make all the hard work pay off even bigger. This is our chance to shift the political landscape dramatically in favor of Joe Biden’s agenda to help American families._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so he can bank early votes and put this race out of reach for Republicans--like Herschel Walker--who'll try to cheat and overturn a loss?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf390357a-7d6a-4f4f-b9ae-76ed65099ce6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thanks so much BlueAmp Community. We're so close to the finish line.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Re-elect Raphael Warnock**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taeb70577-f2b5-4645-9ce2-4c039f94d98d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9d4c0d5a-9495-4224-b813-c1cc58f0e994/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s all going to come down to turnout
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964063:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964064:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964065:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964066:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964067:6rP49YGNn:m:1:3374627611:FA26012C5F8B1EEE73A2B295754E7AEF:r)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: FBI arrests disabled Marine, VA cancels his benefits
body:
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge, but the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zre89er1h7ae586itqaek2bkbe8arsgcsi325d1g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9bl408v9ko0munsc5k7usl0h294gqtra529h8ag_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo18b29mp1uosriho84ela8lkcjbadki2rkfdudo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cdh2bs)
Patriot Zach Rehl received an honorable discharge from the United States Marine Corps...and received a 100% disability rating from the Department of Veterans Affairs.

**But the FBI raided his home on March 17th, 2021, arrested him, and threw him in jail for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 Presidential election at the Capitol on January 6th, 2021.
**
Zach didn’t attack the U.S. Capitol Police. (His own father and grandfather were Philadelphia cops, like my brother, for Pete’s sake.)

Zach didn’t break anything, or even hurt anyone’s feelings with harsh words.

**He simply exercised his right to free speech as an American citizen.
**
But because he’s a member of the Proud Boys, Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has charged him with seditious conspiracy.

Zach has been held without bail this entire time.

**What’s more, he hasn’t had the chance to hold his baby girl even once.
**
**And to add insult to injury, the VA notified his wife, Amanda, that they were cutting off Zach’s disability payments because he’d been charged with seditious conspiracy. Just charged – not convicted!
**
As you can imagine, all of this has been brutally hard on Zach, his wife, and two daughters. No freedom...no rights...no due process...IN AMERICA!

**Patriot, that’s why I’ve filed two critically important class action lawsuits on behalf of each and every January 6 Peaceful Protester who are getting brutally abused by the justice system as I write you this urgent email.
**
If the Biden Justice Department and its FBI can push around and seek to destroy a peaceful, disabled Marine veteran for exercising his right to free speech, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.

You and I, and the people we love in are in grave danger.

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife:

** “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.”
**
That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.
**
I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.
**
I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!
**
And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.
**
[Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.
](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4ojs0dc93u01vsujtaig78h1mgesvmuhovp6b8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cdh2bs)
I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this.

You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th.

We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL!

[Please help me fight for these peaceful January 6 protesters in court with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgq67tmob3c6j6rbva70d90qc3o6l0pijkvr7gvo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cdh2bs)

Zach warns about that in a letter to his wife: “They are jailing innocent people on bogus and trumped-up charges because those people simply supported the sitting president Donald Trump at the time; which is absolutely insane. If you think it can’t happen to you, look at me, because if it can happen to me, trust me, it can happen to you.” That’s why I ask to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court! I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court. Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people. I’m using two powerful lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to do this. You and I can save our country if we act peacefully and legally NOW. Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Patriot, Zach Rehl is one of many good Americans enduring abuse and heartbreaking suffering right now just because they spoke out peacefully on January 6th. We no longer live in a democracy, but instead a Biden “Gestapo Police State!” This CANNOT and WILL NOT stand! The Republicans are doing NOTHING about this, BUT WE WILL! name: American Action News
subject: Math and logic
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5s9g5ve7iuh83gqot6lle2elh8tac33gkfmmgo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cth2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhha322ufaol0s6p5c5fd4rqi94v6hjenh4slpvg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztodr9u259ujtif4l6htekq74699kta9scn4r590_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5hm9ob6cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964077:Jg2hXYGNJ:m:1:3374012347:5902E119CDC63522B753E219A1D96F7E:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964077:Jg2hXYGNJ:m:1:3374012347:5902E119CDC63522B753E219A1D96F7E:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964077:Jg2hXYGNJ:m:1:3374012347:5902E119CDC63522B753E219A1D96F7E:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964077:Jg2hXYGNJ:m:1:3374012347:5902E119CDC63522B753E219A1D96F7E:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964077:Jg2hXYGNJ:m:1:3374012347:5902E119CDC63522B753E219A1D96F7E:r)

Herschel Walker

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He 's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That 's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf1sdm75l9bqful6pd1te74efi07qkkj0oa63cng_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)**
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7jp76nshcq5hemgtujjbk3tm08pn9j4ocvt55q0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)

**Today 's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $5 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $5 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zkjoq4kd3uoo3i1ur2gpohd8vvlcbq74nrf8jrqg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)**
[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $5 -> **](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6m4jkm8og6tr9q7pilaaabvmi0nnjn89ljsf9a8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zvcltd2afetvgs28ejrp0i49evv067hejhd0h6b0_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)

Herschel Walker

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfv1ro812afkfn05t10vs45318iu18irnkd821kg_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuqs1lknveam26j88l4bm2h9ik6gnch2ab2drn5g_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zno14trcd0gflo1ahfpa84hl3mfk15ag1j76eqt8_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs) [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z5jle1r3l92476kfl0mkjio8qkav08n40ri5ptdo_rp22sh2s8i66or4s5jm8oj4chh2bs)

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: What Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964237:JEECxYGtN:m:1:3374012347:24AB3672A337FD354886DB72D21F2C6D:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Warnock has done this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964102:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964103:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964104:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964105:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964106:6BvlxYGAN:m:1:3373497171:FFED47238DA8EE419E743B24666AA2BD:r)

| | Folks, Time and time again, Georgians have made history when it comes to voter participation — and with the support of our team here at Fair Fight and our allies, this year’s upcoming runoff contest will be no different. We’re up against an anti-voter, anti-democracy candidate endorsed by Donald Trump himself. It’s imperative that we re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock so he can continue serving Georgians and working towards an equitable future for all Americans. And we need to keep Herschel Walker out of office. **[Voters will begin casting their ballots statewide on Monday, and we’re going to need all hands on deck to power our outreach efforts and re-elect Sen. Warnock. Can you please split a contribution of $20 today between Fair Fight and Sen. Warnock during this crucial moment?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55118557/380700295/-1341604537?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221126_f_f_split_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQwZWU2Yy05ZDZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khhpNuFxDdnH0itcvJtL_2sVdQg9Bv-MTyLI_kzUqOg=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55118558/380700296/-1341604537?amount=20&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20221126_f_f_split_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWQwZWU2Yy05ZDZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khhpNuFxDdnH0itcvJtL_2sVdQg9Bv-MTyLI_kzUqOg=)

Sen. Warnock is a pro-democracy champion for Georgia and the country, leading the charge to expand and protect the right to vote.
On the other hand, our GOP opponent Herschel Walker has shown Georgians just how deeply unqualified he is to serve the people of Georgia, and the extremist agenda he’ll impose on our state. We know exactly how he’ll lead as a U.S. senator, and we can’t allow it to become a reality.
**All signs show us this runoff will be _neck and neck_ — so we need to ensure every single eligible voter has the chance to make their voice heard at the ballot box. Early voting starts statewide in just two days (with it already underway in some counties) — so it’s crunch time.**

clean_body: All signs show us this runoff will be neck and neck — so we need to ensure every single eligible voter has the chance to make their voice heard at the ballot box. | | | Folks, Time and time again, Georgians have made history when it comes to voter participation — and with the support of our team here at Fair Fight and our allies, this year’s upcoming runoff contest will be no different. We’re up against an anti-voter, anti-democracy candidate endorsed by Donald Trump himself. It’s imperative that we re-elect Sen. Raphael Warnock so he can continue serving Georgians and working towards an equitable future for all Americans. And we need to keep Herschel Walker out of office. = | = Sen. Warnock is a pro-democracy champion for Georgia and the country, leading the charge to expand and protect the right to vote. On the other hand, our GOP opponent Herschel Walker has shown Georgians just how deeply unqualified he is to serve the people of Georgia, and the extremist agenda he’ll impose on our state. We know exactly how he’ll lead as a U.S. senator, and we can’t allow it to become a reality. All signs show us this runoff will be neck and neck — so we need to ensure every single eligible voter has the chance to make their voice heard at the ballot box. Early voting starts statewide in just two days (with it already underway in some counties) — so it’s crunch time. = = Thanks for everything, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2022 Fair Fight - All rights reserved.
