Peter, Starting today, voters can cast their ballots again for Raphael Warnock in the Georgia Senate runoff. Even though Democrats have won 50 seats in the Senate (allowing Vice President Harris to break ties), it will make a HUGE deal if we’re able to pick up the 51st seat to achieve a true majority. That 51st seat would be a game changer in furthering the Democratic agenda:
* Speed up the passage of Democratic legislation and nominations
* Give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee
* Give Democrats full subpoena power
* Vastly reduce the influence of obstructionists like Sinema and Manchin

Not to mention, winning this Georgia seat is incredibly important for Democrats heading into a very difficult 2024 election cycle. And unfortunately, a single medical tragedy for one of our Democratic Senators or any other countless unforeseen circumstance could cause us to lose our 50-seat majority at any time. The 51st seat is absolutely necessary to make sure that doesn’t happen. We’ve already won 50 seats–and we’re confident we can secure a 51st for a real majority with your help. clean_body: | | | Peter, Starting today, voters can cast their ballots again for Raphael Warnock in the Georgia Senate runoff. Even though Democrats have won 50 seats in the Senate (allowing Vice President Harris to break ties), it will make a HUGE deal if we’re able to pick up the 51st seat to achieve a true majority. That 51st seat would be a game changer in furthering the Democratic agenda: Speed up the passage of Democratic legislation and nominations Give Democrats outright majorities instead of 50-50 splits on each committee Give Democrats full subpoena power Vastly reduce the influence of obstructionists like Sinema and Manchin Not to mention, winning this Georgia seat is incredibly important for Democrats heading into a very difficult 2024 election cycle. And unfortunately, a single medical tragedy for one of our Democratic Senators or any other countless unforeseen circumstance could cause us to lose our 50-seat majority at any time. The 51st seat is absolutely necessary to make sure that doesn’t happen. We’ve already won 50 seats–and we’re confident we can secure a 51st for a real majority with your help. Thanks for your continued support of REAL Democrats, -Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: The next generation of leaders in our state – update from your favorite think tank
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132692?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**In recent years, left-wing ideologues have been elected to office in states like California, Oregon, New York and Illinois.** They have raised taxes, imposed radical curriculums in the classroom and in some cases even attempted to defund the police. The results have been a disaster.

**While some parts of the US have lurched left, state leaders across much of the South have gone in the opposite direction.** The South is starting to thrive as a result.

**Already, the southern United States is the most populous region of America.** In the past couple of years, this growth has accelerated as hundreds of thousands of Americans leave the left-wing la la land states, and move to places like Texas, Georgia, Tennessee and Florida.

**If this trend continues, the South may soon become the center of economic, demographic and perhaps even political gravity in America.**

There is one state slap bang in the middle of the South that has not benefited, until now, as much from this growth opportunity - our own state, Mississippi.

**Mississippi needs to emulate what other southern states, like Tennessee, Texas and Florida, have already done.** While we have cut Mississippi’s income tax, Tennessee, Texas and Florida have eliminated theirs. We need to do the same.

While Mississippi deregulates, we have done so by drawing on what we have seen work in neighboring states. It is time to be even bolder and make Mississippi properly competitive.

I am confident that Mississippi is going to grow and prosper just like some of our southern neighbors.

**We must ensure that Mississippi never makes the kind of mistakes that the west coast and parts of the northeast have made.** And to do that, we need to ensure that the next generation of Mississippians understands the importance of free markets, liberty and limited government.

To help us achieve this, we recently launched the Mississippi Leadership Academy – and I am delighted to tell you that it has been a tremendous success.

One Saturday a month, a cohort of about 20 young Mississippians gathers to discuss the challenges our state faces. They have the chance to listen to some of our state leaders and discuss some of the policy solutions we need.

Here are just some of the photos from our most recent Leadership Academy event last week.
---
|
---
Young Mississippians learn to lead
|
---
Shad White shares his vision of our state’s future
|
---
| **The more I work with young Mississippians, the more confident I am about the future of our state.** The battle of ideas can be won, and despite all we hear about ‘woke’ millennials, with the right approach, the next generation of conservative leaders will emerge.

I hope you had a wonderful and uplifting Thanksgiving!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=10bd24c4e9&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: Kari Lake
subject: My message to the People of Arizona & the United States:
body:
| [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxtkUtv4yAUhX-NvcMKj2Bn4UU7aWc1i1Efi24iAhcbxYCFcVP31xfc9CG1EkK6H-ceDlxoMec7VuOGslK1jAisZWlasiEEY8Ix22CMq2MtaM0U1_hItaKsYBuwwgyVDgCxN-4EQaV6qaS3Zd9SfWwk17rRnCtOZJNsGlY3RKrdFrZNObR9jONU0KuC3KY1gZwDVGfjAqhskthJBIMGcQKkfUCpePVOJH7JtkV2sTBNogPkl1FmI3obslEwrivoPoYZCsKtd7AcxgFUB9_owY_RuC8wR3uwoMxsEwvwPPUifPDJz0Hm5veLVhYhZGVOuYYUr6jzz5dDKewoTJftf8b90HgXwcVfJeuLkI4qaQ9uMCqpnm66M3U3d_e7FfZGpf_bj-xFkv9PtgytGs9mGMzE6zSfbp1PHkeKMhi9tEV9XRCythGy_jyZI30UDw__woKWY43-bh9Jlw_Jn7THZYRP5cWkWseeab1_A0zftws)
---

To the People of Arizona and of the United States:

A few weeks ago, Elections in Arizona officially started when Mail-In Ballots were sent out across our State. Election Day was just a few weeks ago, and Maricopa County is STILL counting ballots.

Printer problems, tabulation errors, 3-hour lines or longer, and confusing instructions given by election officials made this Election Day the most chaotic in Arizona's history.

Half of the Voting Centers that opened for the first time on Election Day (where the overwhelming majority of voters were voting for Kari Lake) were not operational or had significant failures.

Would you get on a plane if HALF of the engines didn't work? Would our friends in the media be able to broadcast their nightly propaganda if HALF of their studio equipment was not working? The 2022 General Election in Arizona was botched and broken beyond repair.

Thankfully, the Attorney General's office is demanding answers from Maricopa County. Attorney General Mark Brnovich is taking the first steps necessary to remedy this assault on our Democracy.

This isn't about Republicans or Democrats. This is about our sacred right to Vote, a right that many voters were, sadly, deprived of on November 8th. Tens of thousands have reached out, pleading with me to fight for them. Rest assured, I will. If we give up now, we will no longer have a Country.

Attorneys are working diligently to gather information, whistleblowers ARE coming forward, and the curtain is being lifted. Whether done accidentally or intentionally, it is clear that this Election was a debacle that destroyed any trust in our elections. Arizonans who chose to make their voice heard on Election Day shouldn't be disenfranchised or punished for choosing to vote in person. Yet they were.

I want you to know, Arizona, I will continue fighting until we restore confidence and faith in our elections.

| [**STAND WITH KARI LAKE** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxtks1u3CAUhZ_G3mGZn8GZhRdJR-kiSqQuJotuRgxcbDoGLIyTep4-QCdtpVZCSPfjcDhwgR5zvmcdvqOsVj0jAmtZm560hGBMOGYtxrg5d4J2THGNz1QryirWghVmanQAiKNxFwgq1Vsjva3Hnql2xxU7Eyo5wF6BBipbvSdcAyRUT_0Y47xU9L4ij2ksINcAzbtxAVQ2SewigkGTuADSPqBUXL0Tid-y7ZDdLCyLGAD5bZbZiD6GbBSMGyp6iGGFinDrHWyneQI1wF_05Odo3B-wRnuyoMxqEwvwtowifPLFr0Hmzb8OKixCyMqcsoQUVzT4t9uiFHYWZsj2_8b91HgXwcX_SsqNkI4qaYX1a5HRXapObjIqFQ_X55fj8EPePxU4GpVe8zCzn5J8-27r0Kv53UyTWXiXujWUbuXmpGCT0VtfdQ8VIWUbIaUPZI30VRyPz2FD27lDX3evZMiL5Eua4zbDb-XNpCmfINPu8AFdRbxk)

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: This is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964302:6J565YGNU:m:1:3371812801:3B7D6DBF737C8653A1C9C4424DDD7443:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

subject: He now has 900 campaign staff

body:

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964309:6lRA5YGNG:m:1:3371220873:6904DCDDA50EA2B0DA64539FA6A76D00:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964309:6lRA5YGNG:m:1:3371220873:6904DCDDA50EA2B0DA64539FA6A76D00:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964309:6lRA5YGNG:m:1:3371220873:6904DCDDA50EA2B0DA64539FA6A76D00:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964309:6lRA5YGNG:m:1:3371220873:6904DCDDA50EA2B0DA64539FA6A76D00:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964309:6lRA5YGNG:m:1:3371220873:6904DCDDA50EA2B0DA64539FA6A76D00:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Andy Kim
subject: Appreciation for our small businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
The holiday season's whirlwind of advertisements for sales and online shopping can overshadow the critical role of small businesses in our country.

First, a couple of facts from the Small Business Administration:
*Since 1982, the number of small businesses in the US has doubled, to more than 32 million.

*In fact, 99.9% of businesses in the US are small businesses.

*Small businesses are the beating heart of our economy; they've created nearly two-thirds of new jobs in the past 25 years and they generate almost half of all US economic activity.

But small businesses are more than just places we work or shop; they're community gathering places, valuable sources of support, and creative hubs. And after more than two years of pandemic-related disruption, keeping our small businesses healthy has never been more crucial.

In Congress, I helped pass a bill through the House that would take two big steps to support businesses that have struggled through this pandemic:

First, it would replenish the Restaurant Revitalization Fund (RRF). We created the RRF last spring to provide grants to businesses in the service industry, which was hit particularly hard by COVID-19. The initial round of funding only met the needs of about one-third of the applicants, so we passed a second bill to help the more than 150,000 restaurants still waiting for assistance get the support they need.

Second, building on the success of the RRF, we'd create a Hard Hit Industries Award Program to get businesses in all sectors – not just the restaurant and service industries – back on their feet, while ensuring that no applicants are left out in the cold.

I know times feel tough right now. That's because many folks are still getting back on their feet. But initiatives like these have and continue to make a difference and they're one key element of our effort to keep our economy improving.

The other key piece is us ; as we do our holiday shopping, we have the chance to boost small, local businesses, and support the entrepreneurs and workers right here in our own community. That's why I encourage you to shop small and do your holiday shopping at small businesses in our community. Our efforts can make a difference in local stores and restaurants being able to share in the success as our economy rebounds. Even the smallest choices can make a difference.

Our movement has always been about building a thriving community rooted in service, compassion, and cooperation. We've shown over and over that we have the power and the spirit to make lasting, meaningful change. I'm proud of the work we've done so far, and I'm excited for the work to come.

Happy holidays,

Andy

clean_body: Getting out the vote for Warnock vs. Walker! = | Fellow activist, I’m proud to tell you the New Pennsylvania Project arrived in Savannah, Georgia today, and we’re already at work getting out the vote for the upcoming U.S. Senate runoff election! In collaboration with our allies at the New Georgia Project, we’ve come up with a winning game plan to maximize our impact and truly make a difference on the ground in Georgia. I have to say, working alongside them on this crucial race is a truly incredible experience. = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Hey team! It’s Patrick, Wes’ finance director. The last time you heard from me was before Election Day, so first, I just want to say THANK YOU for everything you’ve done to help elect Wes and Aruna earlier this month. Now that we’ve achieved victory, Wes and Aruna are focused on a smooth transition over the next couple of months before their inauguration on January 18, 2023, so they can get to work for you on Day 1 of their administration. **Once they’re inaugurated and in session, our campaign committee has to HALT fundraising.** That means for the months of January through April, we won’t be able to build our resources to keep our campaign strong throughout Wes’ and Aruna’s tenure. It gives us limited time and opportunities to conduct grassroots fundraising before we must pause. **That makes this November’s end-of-month deadline all the more important. It’s our first post-election deadline, and one of the last before we have to freeze grassroots fundraising.** **[With our deadline approaching in just four days from now, will you pitch in $10 or more to refuel our campaign and support Wes and Aruna before January’s fundraising freeze?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55116885/380694200/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221126eom1_pd_od30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk0NmY1Yi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYJXg-1gUyjsMRXUsWf0VcmKClwgOqfLUplNOVRk-3k=)** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55116887/380694204/1062064798?refcode=fl_email_fr_20221126eom1_pd_od30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDk0NmY1Yi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYJXg-1gUyjsMRXUsWf0VcmKClwgOqfLUplNOVRk-3k=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey team! It’s Patrick, Wes’ finance director. The last time you heard from me was before Election Day, so first, I just want to say THANK YOU for everything you’ve done to help elect Wes and Aruna earlier this month. Now that we’ve achieved victory, Wes and Aruna are focused on a smooth transition over the next couple of months before their inauguration on January 18, 2023, so they can get to work for you on Day 1 of their administration. Once they’re inaugurated and in session, our campaign committee has to HALT fundraising. That means for the months of January through April, we won’t be able to build our resources to keep our campaign strong throughout Wes’ and Aruna’s tenure. It gives us limited time and opportunities to conduct grassroots fundraising before we must pause. That makes this November’s end-of-month deadline all the more important. It’s our first post-election deadline, and one of the last before we have to freeze grassroots fundraising. = = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = = | = = Grassroots supporters like you are the reason we defeated the odds and won this critical governor’s race. I hope you’ll help keep up the momentum during this transition period and throughout Wes’ and Aruna’s first term in Annapolis! Thanks, Patrick Denny Finance Director, Moore for Maryland | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! Thanks to supporters like you, we made history by electing Wes the 63rd Governor of Maryland. Support Wes as he works to move our state forward and leave no one behind. | = Use of military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense. | By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer Wes Moore for Maryland PO Box 50123 Baltimore, MD 21211 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Georgia is the 2nd most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. President Biden won this swing state in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast. … It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls. Can you help at this vital time?
body:
Early voting today!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T057e7252-3462-4228-b14f-bb01bc2a4c44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between a Senator Warnock and a Senator (gulp...) Herschel Walker._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T324019fa-94d6-4b8b-a8e9-08356c907ead/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Sadly, we were not able to end Lauren Boebert's political career this election due to only 554 votes. 554. Alternatively, our great ally Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held her seat, winning the entire state of Nevada by only 9,007 votes. In 2020, the GOP won a U.S. House seat in Iowa by only 6 votes. Yes, you read that right._** **_Georgia, according to Democracy Docket, is the second most expensive state to vote in. It costs .98 cents for each person to vote. This is in a close swing state that President Biden won in 2020 by only 12,670 votes--out of just under 500,000 votes cast.__ _** **_It's simple. $5 gets us 5 votes to the polls in this razor-thin swing state. $10 can get 10 votes. And so on. This is it, our last election this cycle. It is so important to again reject Trump, McConnell, gain momentum and add a vote on each Senate committee so we get crucial bills on women's rights, climate, gay rights, gun safety and so much more onto the Senate floor._ **
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Get out the vote in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T36f1dc93-7538-43f9-8a94-8daf79843efb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_Today, early voting in Georgia begins. Can we, the Blue Amp Action community, once again show our strength and be a difference maker?_** [**_Can you give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to get Georgia Democrats to the polls to strengthen The Peach State and America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2e03fbc-119e-4b12-9f0c-7583cccbe808/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
**We're. So. Close. Thank you all, once again, for your determination to protect democracy.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Brandon Tatum
subject: Who are the real racists?
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964410:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)

Hey Peter,

Who are the real racists in America?

The people trying to hold Black people accountable to lift themselves out of poverty through enterprise and hard work?

_**Or those telling Black people that they are forever victims and can't get ahead in life, so they need to depend on the government and rich liberals?**_

The answer? The latter group.

The media, academic institutions, and the radicals all treat Black people like they can't achieve anything on their own.

They're turning victimhood into a nationwide epidemic.

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brandon Tatum. I co-founded BLEXIT with Candace Owens. Our mission is to change the narrative surrounding America's minority communities -- with a particular focus on Black Americans.

This month, one of our goals is to raise $50,000 to support our mission of uplifting Black and minority communities.

[_**Peter, can I count on you to stop modern racism? All you have to do is donate any amount today. Click here to join our mission >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964410:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)

This is deeply personal to me.

I served in the Tucson Police Department as a SWAT operator, field training officer, general instructor, and Public Information Officer.

I've patrolled the streets and interacted with these communities.

And I saw young men and women who believed they were hopeless because all they heard was, _" You're helpless," "You can't do that because of your skin color,"_ and _ "You won't achieve anything."_

But that's not true, and we're here to prove it!

**BLEXIT is doing things no other organization in the country is doing.** We work with communities that are often ignored and provide opportunities for leaders to step forward to make our country a better place.

We are empowering Black communities to abolish the mainstream narrative of the victimhood mentality.

[_**Can you help share the truth -- that these young men and women can achieve anything -- with a gift of $25, $35, or any amount? **__**Click here >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964410:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)

BLEXIT's programs give people the opportunity to shape their futures
and pursue the American Dream. All while championing our values of**faith, family, and freedom** to empower Black and urban communities.

It is our goal to lift up these urban communities.

Peter, I am personally asking you to help make this goal a reality.

Supporting BLEXIT means you're supporting your fellow Americans as they
change the narrative that's holding them back.

Can you send your urgent donation today to meet our fundraising goal?

[**Donate $25 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964411:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $35 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964412:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $50 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964413:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $100 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964414:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $250 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964415:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $500 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964416:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $1,000 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964417:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate $2,500 >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964418:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)
[**Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964410:JuFXUYG1N:m:1:3331421248:80626E2AB9883DD37B006FE554E43030:r)

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._

name: Retired Rear Admiral
subject: This makes me SICK 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson
body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964330:6O9qUYGNn:m:1:3371220873:495E6BBDEEA425D80FED31C36AE1526F:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

clean_body: I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military " If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!" Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex. If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. ****** ************ **** **** ******************** **** **** **** **** **** **** | Paid for by Texans for Ronny Jackson PO BOX 53058 AMARILLO, TX 79159 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 12, 2022. subject: Peter, Warnock has done this before
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964359:6ho8OYGNe:m:1:3370555685:B97ACE7BE77C60A72EAABE1FA78EBC37:r)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: My story speaks to exactly why I'm in this fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend: Today, I wanted to reach out and tell you a little bit about myself. My story speaks to exactly why I'm in this fight – and it's important I share that with you.

First, here's a picture of me as a kid with a few of my siblings! (I'm in the bottom-right corner.)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117159/380695415/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)
I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters – and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents taught us the meaning of hard work and always said we could do _anything_ we put our minds to. Thanks to their support, I became the first in my family to earn a college degree.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117160/380695416/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)
>From there, I followed in the footsteps of my mom and dad – both preachers – and eventually worked my way up to become the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117161/380695417/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)
But I've always believed my impact doesn't stop at the church doors. That's just where it begins. That's why I ran for the U.S. Senate in the first place. Last year, with unprecedented grassroots support from folks like you, we made _history_. Now, I'm humbled to serve as Georgia's first Black senator and work hard to make sure every child can achieve their American dream – just like I did.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117162/380695418/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)
Here's the thing, friend: Keeping up this fight won't be easy. Experts say this race will be close – and the GOP is spending millions to defeat me.

**So the only way I can protect my seat and continue being a voice for Georgians is with your help.****That's why I'm personally asking:[Will you chip in $5 or more today to help us turn out the vote, win in Georgia, and secure a brighter future for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117163/380695419/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)**
Thank you for being part of our people-powered movement. As always, I'm so grateful for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117164/380695420/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4856-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=)
---

If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! If you’d like to receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55117165/380695421/-1565680314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGZmMDEwYi05YjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixnfMXXUpsie0ouXnvmoMN4IlxiUtPENvuYWo7jX_8I=&emci=ec048af9-385a-ed11-819c-002248258d2f&emdi=e0ff010b-9b6d-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379). | | © 2022 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. subject: $1, for the last time before Georgia
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to VoteVets today.
#
Derek -
$1.
That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to VoteVets today. Yes, $1.
$1 to help us expand our ad buys in Georgia before the runoff.
$1 to help us turn out Democratic Veterans in the Georgia runoff.
$1 to help us reach our fundraising goals to get it done before our final budget decisions of the 2022 election are made this weekend.
We know that $1 probably doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can win an expensive Senate race, but when lots and lots of people are chipping in $1, it all adds up. Especially when our work is so effective.
So what do you say?
[**Please make a $1 contribution to VoteVets before we make our final budget decisions before the Georgia runoff. This is it! We can win this race and secure the 51st seat in just a few weeks.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221126-1-15&t=1&akid=7189%2E3013755%2ELfqikQ)

name: American Briefing

**The Situation:** In four days, November will come to a close and we’ll start the final month of the year. Right now — as can happen during the holidays — our fundraising has taken a slight dip. **The Plan:** What we do for the remainder of this year will set the tone for 2023 and beyond. _That’s why we set a goal to raise $10,000 by Wednesday, November 30._ **The Numbers:** Whether it’s $5, $10, or more, the amount folks chip in is not as important as the contribution itself. name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Making a difference today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Friend,

I hope you had a safe and restful Thanksgiving.

Today is Small Business Saturday and I hope you’ll join me in supporting local shops near you. Local businesses are a central backbone of our communities and as we begin to emerge from this pandemic, they are struggling like the rest of us.

Small businesses are job creators — adding almost half of all jobs every year and shopping small this Holiday season ensures these businesses can stay open. So, today, I hope you'll join me in supporting small businesses wherever you live.

I don’t want to imagine a world without the local businesses in my neighborhood and I’m sure you feel the same. Don’t let that happen: join me today and shop locally at a small business either online or safely in-person.

Thank you and have a wonderful weekend,

Josh

---
|

clean_body: | | Friend, I hope you had a safe and restful Thanksgiving. Today is Small Business Saturday and I hope you’ll join me in supporting local shops near you. Local businesses are a central backbone of our communities and as we begin to emerge from this pandemic, they are struggling like the rest of us. Small businesses are job creators — adding almost half of all jobs every year and shopping small this Holiday season ensures these businesses can stay open. So, today, I hope you'll join me in supporting small businesses wherever you live. I don’t want to imagine a world without the local businesses in my neighborhood and I’m sure you feel the same. Don’t let that happen: join me today and shop locally at a small business either online or safely in-person. Thank you and have a wonderful weekend, Josh | * PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

name: Team Edwards
subject: Houston’s thriving small businesses
disclaimer_text: paid for by Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
| | | Support your local small businesses today and every day. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wB7DWu1u8h5QTGLUn-vuE3hu6E28TwOViBeqTZzuoBibwv2xIFa7MrZrvj1bKAwhW1lgSjRCj_MToWSpGGIsaBGxdKgSh16b4aG5VIltMKA010F4rmW0gPr9SmWUoDhSi9zaUm8C6Pi-0TdYdtPvzdKL1nx6n1kqyDaVoK7Kb3v-8LtgJQw7wFQY6bAz5Vk1XKmgs8wQIRqj-P190TjkZU6NaieNwiWa5dFpGRSTyCKrnIfWgCyz1dgbykwJ0Mv09sgt6CmGRkAePdY5WqHkfOSa2d1U6WZnsZQUc15mt83YQV0UD_1Xt_RSJizFXsZSK8pEo-ozh-qZdM3A9fAX9Z9eeUoK9g1BxbT7pY2BZdwOCjU2p5i0i6HkMBhf0-Qy5Mxm3jVWCcKmVJOS20u_B3UOCw2L64E7WS-25TaHh9Ugtrrb4DFiAdLjazuCopHQw/3rh/bJtV1uSvQFefqNnVd9FHBQ/h0/KuKNZO0k9O2jmFCL9W0piQhhe_n_vx4dBmZocvBiG90) | | Team, did you know today is Small Business Saturday?

Houston runs on small businesses that drive our prosperity, and today is a day to show how much we appreciate all they do for our communities. As the backbone of our economy, it is imperative that the city works to invest in and grow our small business community.

Amanda knows this, which is why she formed The City of Houston Women & Minority Small Business Owner Task Force to make sure our small businesses have the tools they need to succeed. This task force helped highlight the major disparities that women and minority entrepreneurs face in Houston and came up with strategies and solutions in order to address them.

To address these disparities, Amanda expanded on her involvement, creating the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help remove barriers to accessing capital and scaling businesses owned by women and minority-owned small businesses. Amanda is fighting every day for our small business community and ensuring every Houstonian has the resources they need to build wealth and prosperity. So on this Small Business Saturday, we hope you join her in supporting the small businesses that make Houston a city that reflects America’s future.

clean_body: | | | Support your local small businesses today and every day. | | Team, did you know today is Small Business Saturday? Houston runs on small businesses that drive our prosperity, and today is a day to show how much we appreciate all they do for our communities. As the backbone of our economy, it is imperative that the city works to invest in and grow our small business community. Amanda knows this, which is why she formed The City of Houston Women & Minority Small Business Owner Task Force to make sure our small businesses have the tools they need to succeed. This task force helped highlight the major disparities that women and minority entrepreneurs face in Houston and came up with strategies and solutions in order to address them. To address these disparities, Amanda expanded on her involvement, creating the Business Ecosystem Alliance for Minorities and Women (BEAMW) to help remove barriers to accessing capital and scaling businesses owned by women and minority-owned small businesses. Amanda is fighting every day for our small business community and ensuring every Houstonian has the resources they need to build wealth and prosperity. So on this Small Business Saturday, we hope you join her in supporting the small businesses that make Houston a city that reflects America’s future. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Onwards, Team Edwards Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. body:
I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964408:6cV50YG5N:m:1:3370555685:39A7CE87DB00E43CE451A6E4266E6C5D:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Peter, I’m getting concerned
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)
---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)

**Today's Goal:** Have 10,000 folks like you chip in $25 so we can increase the number of people on OUR side making calls, knocking on doors, sending texts, and talking to voters.

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

Chip in $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)
We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964518:JTvjRYGNS:m:1:3369487795:3E6DD77BD78F39CE2368260AA6BF2696:r)

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: Derek, this is going to be a squeaker.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We’ve got to fight with every ounce of energy we have over these next nine days to get Senator Warnock re-elected. | |
---
In just nine days, Georgians will head to the polls _again_ to choose their next senator. I’ve been in politics for a long time, so let me tell you: _This one is going to be a squeaker_. Right now, Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock and MAGA Republican Herschel Walker are crisscrossing the Peach State to get out the vote before the December 6 runoff. **With a little bit of elbow grease and help from a lot of loyal Democrats like you, I know we can win this.** **This grassroots team has spent the year helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Now, Senator Warnock is counting on your support to bring this home. Will you split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC before Wednesday’s fundraising deadline?**

Some folks think it's a pipe dream that Democrats can win in traditionally red states. But I was born in Georgia, and I’ve seen firsthand what's possible when we roll up our sleeves and get to work. Last cycle, we turned both of Georgia’s seats blue for the _first time_ in nearly two decades -- all because the DNC invested early and folks like you stepped up when it mattered most. That’s the power of this grassroots team, Derek. But we can’t take last cycle for granted. I’ve been in politics for a long time, so let me tell you: This one is going to be a squeaker. Right now, Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock and MAGA Republican Herschel Walker are crisscrossing the Peach State to get out the vote before the December 6 runoff. With a little bit of elbow grease and help from a lot of loyal Democrats like you, I know we can win this. This grassroots team has spent the year helping elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. Now, Senator Warnock is counting on your support to bring this home. Will you split a $10 donation between his campaign and the DNC before Wednesday’s fundraising deadline? Some folks think it's a pipe dream that Democrats can win in traditionally red states. But I was born in Georgia, and I’ve seen firsthand what's possible when we roll up our sleeves and get to work. Last cycle, we turned both of Georgia’s seats blue for the first time in nearly two decades -- all because the DNC invested early and folks like you stepped up when it mattered most. That’s the power of this grassroots team, Derek. But we can’t take last cycle for granted. name: Joe Kent
subject: FW: Please help fund the recount!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Recount Fund
body:
Peter,
Did you see Joe's message below? We urgently need to raise $80,000 to pay the Secretary of State's cost iif we are going to fund the recount. We're still a long-way off but every donation brings us closer.
Please make a donation to the fund today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/q0pb8lBgsR7Usjx5yhWQ7A/6MZmteyGfCLgqxhPZYcGWA). Even if you maxed out to the campaign previously, you are still allowed to give up to $2800 (or anything you can afford).
We're counting on you!

Ozzie Gonzalez
Campaign Manager
Joe Kent for Congress

* * *
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Joe Kent**
Date: Fri, Nov 25, 2022 at 2:46 PM
Subject: Please help fund the recount!

Dear Peter,
Here in Washington State, the election officials are still counting ballots and our campaign is still hard at work fixing many our supporter ballots that were rejected. The margin is well under 1% and shrinking fast.
We are preparing to request a recount but, unfortunately, our campaign will have to pay for it.
Will you help us raise the approximately $80,000 we need by donating at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/q0pb8lBgsR7Usjx5yhWQ7A/6MZmteyGfCLgqxhPZYcGWA)?
We believe a recount would be worthwhile given the narrow margin, the documented technical issues in the signature verification process, human error, and the precedent of elections being overturned in our state following recounts.
The maximum contribution to the recount fund is $2900 (or $5800 for married couples). Anything you can spare would help us.
We have a VERY short timeline to raise the money - just a few days. Please give whatever you can afford at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/q0pb8lBgsR7Usjx5yhWQ7A/6MZmteyGfCLgqxhPZYcGWA).
Thank you and God Bless,

Joe Kent
PS - With the margin less than 1%, please help raise money to pay for the recount. We have just a few days to raise the money. Donate today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Recount](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/q0pb8lBgsR7Usjx5yhWQ7A/6MZmteyGfCLgqxhPZYcGWA).

Paid for by the Joe Kent for Congress Recount Fund.

[Unsubscribe]

President Biden doesn't have an answer for soaring gas prices, so here is my response: the buck stops with the President, this is his mess and he needs to fix it. There are no words that can describe this level of failure and betrayal of the American people.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend: Our battleground race just shifted into new territory, and I urgently need folks like you by my side to keep up the fight. Here's why: |
• FIRST, right-wing super PACs flooded tens of millions of dollars into Georgia to help my opponent, Herschel Walker, win. • BUT THEN, our people-powered movement fought back against this unprecedented spending and forced our race into a runoff election. **• NOW, we need _all hands on deck_ to pull ahead and keep Georgia blue. We're looking for 538 more folks to give before our crucial 11:59 p.m. deadline, but time is running out, and we're falling short.** So much is at stake, friend. We got to this point without taking a cent from corporate PACs, and I'm determined to continue this fight the grassroots way. That's why I'm counting on you to pitch in whatever you can at this critical moment.
**[Please, will you rush a donation of $5 or more right now split between Kirsten Gillibrand and me so we can defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55141867/380743560/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3801-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmRhYWExZi1kMTZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AeYvgCEei7VwaAKs9RvJKZWGyav27x9whHPVcj8Ap8o=)**

subject: Three reasons why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our work
happens 365 days a year.

There’s no slowdown season for us. We’re going up against the entire
political establishment to elect even more progressive champions like
Summer Lee, Cori Bush, and the entire Squad.

Each month we set fundraising goals to:

1. Make sure we can pay our bills: We have organizational costs that
include staff salaries, technology costs, running our organizing
programs, and more.
2. Plan for the future: Even though we just had the midterm elections,
we’re already getting prepared to launch our 2024 candidate
recruitment. It takes a lot of resources to recruit candidates like
AOC.
3. Ensure we have the resources to fight back against right-wing super
PACs like AIPAC that spent millions of dollars against our endorsed
candidates this cycle.

We set a goal to raise $110,000 this November and right now we’re just
over 79% of the way to our goal and we only have a few days until our
deadline.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121955?refcode=em20221126-26254&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m ]Peter, we
depend on grassroots support and every single contribution truly makes a
difference for us. Please, will you pitch in $3 right now
to help us stay on track toward reaching our November fundraising goal?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/121955?refcode=em20221126-26254&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m ]Contribute $3

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party, to continue to
defeat entrenched corporate incumbents and grow our progressive bloc in
Congress. Thank you for being a part of this movement.

More soon,

Team Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221126-26254-footer&t=1023&refcode2=26254_1203867_j7Vk7m&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=26254%2E1203867%2Ej7Vk7m

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The Great Reset and socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” | | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d34ad0f61884a66962a34975fa9fad5&_e=Cl2EEBcgEoW0NhSKd_PU1CloJFcTmQ29nFScXFRgE6XJrGmlFTtpyN-IkmkYNf44ErK0PMhM3o5S0iTK0zOgJ3B67kJ77AiMhRjSAQxvh4XRT7wfXzlnpPLw8yoPQA7ahvK1HQDee3Ytmbg5PX6xxjCAH_ewQGS8_Pxt1NU_ctibXOUPsuXPVr7WG_RChhgxqWHTL2pMa0571W00yfQQbRtDn0jGS-_Ivyqxiqf4-goO7exhynNPlb41PBgBZXMPrYGQU1lLTbZRjDM2Tgh8MBTDLvnMQhm0C2kUlcHBj-4hVSkDMaqgOg2e0BTc7pAblwuMfPyL1oVJTxApWK1p37xK81DYrSkOxgFGLAmADm9bU0RbMX5JgYagcBVlQimRf64Q_RtwfJ4c-C42s_l2mLOBOPEQ_Wg7KpRYVk5Loh8%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d34ad0f61884a66962a34975fa9fad5&_e=Cl2EEBcgEoW0NhSKd_PU1CloJFcTmQ29nFScXFRgE6XJrGmlFTtpyN-IkmkYNf44ErK0PMhM3o5S0iTK0zOgJ3B67kJ77AiMhRjSAQxvh4XRT7wfXzlnpPLw8yoPQA7ahvK1HQDee3Ytmbg5PX6xxjCAH_ewQGS8_Pxt1NU_ctibXOUPsuXPVr7WG_RChhgxqWHTL2pMa0571W00yfQQbRtDn0jGS-_Ivyqxiqf4-goO7exhynNPlb41PBgBZXMP1-V8U_d0R4f5Vqk3seDEIwF0HwDq3y1auAvTxKPZ0VRQv4pW6oMhLf6kDsD350fNkrGo7wriU45zpgz2R1ua7wUIm-EqH5tX-qU0Q-oIJCWcpq0D_93DR7US5IqzubaEYjv7GKZK6vpJBdKMJtg0ox6oREOQyes0mj4OaXuxyRs%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0d34ad0f61884a66962a34975fa9fad5&_e=Cl2EEBcgEoW0NhSKd_PU1CloJFcTmQ29nFScXFRgE6XJrGmlFTtpyN-IkmkYNf44ErK0PMhM3o5S0iTK0zOgJ3B67kJ77AiMhRjSAQxvh4XRT7wfXzlnpPLw8yoPQA7ahvK1HQDee3Ytmbg5PX6xxjCAH_ewQGS8_Pxt1NU_ctibXOUPsuXPVr7WG_RChhgxqWHTL2pMa0571W00yfQQbRtDn0jGS-_Ivyqxiqf4-goO7exhynNPlb41PBgBZXMPMbhrouvRUqaUtrRgG9cvxMoyvSQHvPPJNd0koG2Bq9RpD_vkIimbaci9NdNSImD9ozmSUlcXGOsOW82j5-BHaVVZg49rzNbtgn8r3QZG6vk2oZT5xzyPYoOb4MDd_AuhyG6zCFRzbkX7mMPBGFtfDLbRKlRaLkgjidAInUsnH3Y%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=0d34ad0f61884a66962a34975fa9fad5&_t=VQgtKZERUJCtjqhyv9fl-lI9GNcInJA-kXac2TdMsneDE-n20z2gDRhsU6Tso43Ljq_2Wphl5BHaoIseP7CuKi7d1HxAc8YRCdTOuguUPrJi7tP9VwjAYhLrQYckLMFyA5cUKvtmTk80iFq535ED8Vp-6JZ2QLMuF9QMaHe0Z8g%3D)

name: Common Sense Florida

body:
It won’t be easy
---
| | | | | |

Friend,
Florida showed up and showed off this year and because of that, we stopped the far-left Democrats’ attempt to flip the state Blue and keep a majority in Congress.
**_Why?_ Because most Floridians are sick and tired of the empty promises and lies they’ve been fed by the Democrat Party for decades, and are eager to just return to common sense principles.**
But now Democrats are rallying top dark money mega donors from across the country and scheming harder than ever before to steal this state in 2024 and begin a total socialist takeover the likes of which we’ve never seen before, and a return to divisive rhetoric.
Common Sense Florida is leading the fight to expose the Left’s lies in the Sunshine State and throughout the country and we’re mobilizing a grassroots coalition to stop liberal influence in Florida and keep the state Red for years to come.
**[It will all come down to Florida in 2024. Join my fight to keep this state Red save our country from far-left radicals>>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUU2P2yAQ_TX2zZYZYpIcfMg2ylaq1EtVVXtCGIaELR9ejOXm3xcst5UqoUHzHrx5M4MDYex8OAGh51oNggmNqjYDdACEACPHDsipJT3tzgyhBwJS46E6dOiEsa0gq4gxBNfK4OrHMGqaJQQlpOtGKnROzj2lRI5SnATrazs8Uprmil4quOUzo1witqvxEVURyViOLvhmRj9jo0NstA3RKFGoWXMVPA-Or5FbnRrrCR8j_2O4ojfhwuJTRa_QV8BiKRCNv2cgxQUztCTHHSqzuIxtfezgHJYoMYNeWi7cZI1-7pTMqTB3X2RLob7ZrYhkih_7dJORRVXwfSTcok5mzrdYvHwUm-EnRnHHf2538eATbpZz4ebw49tluunb6-dMc2-NysR_4MOoPMPrr3H9DpeV1nFQ02qsNTM75uXct-WUlexdDNXxpQLYvgFs04ePt9XF5d19eW1O72_NB_vq-kLCpxzTc8K_L3eRdp8VVMfrb_atuDM)** | | | | [JOIN THIS FIGHT](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUcuOnDAQ_Bq4gXADBg4cNplspETKYaUc9mQZ057xxA_WGDHz97ERSaRIVluusqvL1TgSSoemB1IP-TxyyiXOuRqhAiAEKOkqIH1J2roaKEILBITEJmsqNFzpkpOde--cKYUz-W3kXEBXTQ2dhKwH2bbYk36YGlENlUQJuR5vISxrVr9k8BrXimLzWO7KepyTSMRiNc4WK9oVC-l8IbXzauaJWiWbnWXOsN0zLUOhLWGTZ38MZ_UrN26zIasv0GZAfWrglb1GIPgNI7QFwwzOajMRO_5xgqvbvMAIWqEZN4tW8nlSIh65utokmxq1xWmFB5X86KdZlEiqnJ2RMI0yqDXufLPilmy6X-j5Ff-5PcWdDXhYjo0L-fbl8Y3e3-pHpJnVao7Ef-BNzTHDy2Paf8LLXud-nJddaa1W2sXhXI_hpJGcvxiz7lMGcDwDONKHj_fd-O1uvn8t-vt78UF_mDaR8DnW8Fzw781TpDyzgqy7_AYr5bi3)
---
The Left knows my state is the key to keeping the White House in 2024 and that’s why I’m fighting so hard in Florida to educate young voters, swing voters, and independents.

**Our country is worth fighting for...** I know that you know that. But now it’s time Patriots from all walks of life come together to preserve our freedom and our way of life as we fight against the threat of socialism.

I’ll be honest: It won’t be easy and it never has, but I’m ready for it and I’d love to have you fighting by my side as we go into the most consequential election cycle of our lifetime.

**[So please, get on the frontlines and join my fight to keep this state Red save our country from far-left radicals>>](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUU2vnCAU_TW608hFURcupp28Lpp00zbpWxEGrjO88uFDjJ1_XzC2TZqQSzgHzj2cixNhbGwHIHQs1SSYmFGVeoIGgBBgpG-ADDXpaDMyhA4IyBnbom3QCm1qQXYRgve2lt6Wj6lXhDQMKBkV6-jY0aGRIPpRtQPSm2xLMz1iXNaCXgp4SWtFuQWsd-0CqiySsFStd9WKbsVq9qGajQ9aiUytM1fecW_5HriZY2Uc4bfA_xgu6IuwfnOxoFfoCmAhNwja3RMQw4YJ2qLlFpXebMKOf5zg6rcgMYFOGi7sYvT8PCmZjkLfXZbNjbrqtCKizn7M0y5aZlXBz0i4wTnqNe1ic_KRbfqfGMQd_7k9xb2LeFhOjauv449v1_kCsCeaO6NVIv4DH1qlDK-_bvt3uOy0DJNadm2MXlmfhnM_hpNHcv5iKvoPBcDxDOBIH95fdxu2N_v5UzW8vVbv7IvtMgkfU43PBf_ePEXqMyso-utvnV222g)**

I look forward to having you with us.

Yours in Liberty,

Fabian Basabe
Chairman, Common Sense Florida

I'm absolutely mortified on what's happening to our military

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r) _**" If you don't shower with a transgender person, we're kicking you OUT of the Marine Corps!"**_ Peter, I don't mean to be crass, but this is the horrific reality the troops in our military are facing. **Instead of setting our sights on America 's enemies, Joe Biden has put a target on the back of every service member who doesn't want to shower with members of the opposite sex.** If they refuse, Joe Biden has pledged to have them removed WITHOUT an honorable discharge. Peter, this makes me SICK. When I was deployed to Iraq as a young Navy Medical officer, I saw firsthand the horrific wounds Marines suffered on the battlefield. These wounded Marines were the bravest Americans I will ever encounter in my entire life, and not a day goes by where I don't think of the sacrifices I saw they made for our country. I treat military service with the utmost seriousness, and what Joe Biden is doing to politicize the U.S. Military is a DISGRACE to every American who's worn the uniform. [**But now, I desperately need your help to protect everyone of our service members.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR SAILORS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR AIRMEN**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** **[**DEFEND OUR MARINES**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** **The DC Swamp hates that I'm doing this** , and they're primed to spend millions to crush me. I have a crucial fundraising deadline tonight and I'm humbly asking you for help. [**Would you chip in just $5 by midnight tonight to make sure I have what it takes to stop the insane Left from destroying our nation?**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r) **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** Please, please help our active duty troops. Without your support, they will all be kicked to the curb. Thank you & God Bless. **[**DEFEND OUR SOLDIERS**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61964552:J5gfgYGIN:m:1:3369487795:6AF41B9B97A9BB5D08CF870D372BEE1B:r)** ******** **************** ******** ******** ************************ ********

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Early donations make all the difference in a competitive election cycle. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55142215/380745828/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20221126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRjOGVmZC1kNjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3csCu7l2RKodhjm-dca3Vhbe9t9C7Lf9ulzfun80JM=&emci=7e9c4306-a66d-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e04c8efd-d66d-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=252045)
---
What a month, folks! We racked up a lot of wins during a midterm year that was supposed to be difficult for Democrats. We hit the ground running by defending the Senate majority after helping re-elect Senators Catherine Cortez Masto, Mark Kelly, and Maggie Hassan in battleground states, sending Rev. Raphael Warnock to a runoff, and flipping Pennsylvania blue with Senator-Elect John Fetterman. We even helped stop a so-called red wave in the House — electing strong Democrats like Gabe Vasquez, who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd District and contributed to Republicans’ House majority being much narrower than expected. And we held strong majorities in the New Mexico Legislature — electing champions for our public lands and reproductive rights. Now, we need to look ahead. That starts with helping Rev. Warnock win his runoff in just a few weeks to expand our Senate majority and deliver more wins for folks across the country. Next up is defending the Senate, winning back the House, and defeating Donald Trump in 2024. More than 20 Senate seats are up for re-election in 2024 — **including mine in New Mexico** — so we don’t have a moment to waste. **That’s why I’m hoping you’ll pitch in ahead of my campaign’s first end-of-month goal of the election cycle. Can you donate $10 or more before the deadline? Early donations make all the difference in a competitive election cycle.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55142216/380745829/1569788089?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20221126_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDRjOGVmZC1kNjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d3csCu7l2RKodhjm-dca3Vhbe9t9C7Lf9ulzfun80JM=)
