clean_body: Early donations make all the difference in a competitive election cycle. What a month, folks! We racked up a lot of wins during a midterm year that was supposed to be difficult for Democrats. We hit the ground running by defending the Senate majority after helping re-elect Senators Catherine Cortez Masto, Mark Kelly, and Maggie Hassan in battleground states, sending Rev. Raphael Warnock to a runoff, and flipping Pennsylvania blue with Senator-Elect John Fetterman. We even helped stop a so-called red wave in the House — electing strong Democrats like Gabe Vasquez, who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd District and contributed to Republicans’ House majority being much narrower than expected. And we held strong majorities in the New Mexico Legislature — electing champions for our public lands and reproductive rights. Now, we need to look ahead. That starts with helping Rev. Warnock win his runoff in just a few weeks to expand our Senate majority and deliver more wins for folks across the country. Next up is defending the Senate, winning back the House, and defeating Donald Trump in 2024. More than 20 Senate seats are up for re-election in 2024 — including mine in New Mexico — so we don’t have a moment to waste. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll pitch in ahead of my campaign’s first end-of-month goal of the election cycle. Can you donate $10 or more before the deadline? Early donations make all the difference in a competitive election cycle. As the top Democrat in the House, she's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can we count on your support? = Nancy isn't one to back down from a fight, and we're in this for the long haul. We'd hate to see you leave our movement completely, but if you must, please click . | Nancy Pelosi for Congress 700 13TH STREET NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States | | Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress

Fellow American,

Raphael Warnock is getting millions funneled to his campaign by Democrat billionaires and Hollywood celebrities. He's spending millions a day on false ads to defeat me. **Fellow American, we've got to fight back IMMEDIATELY**.

clean_body: | BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million Peter, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff. That's a lot of money. He significantly outraised us. Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle! There are just 10 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: There's so much at stake in this runoff election. This is our last chance to slow down Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer's disastrous agenda that's crippling America. As the LAST election of the 2022 cycle, Georgia is our FINAL chance to ensure Democrats don't have a 51-seat advantage in the Senate. Please, Peter, let me know you're still with us. name: Sen. Raphael Warnock (via Democrats.org)
subject: re: the power of this grassroots team...

body:
We have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. | |
---
Derek, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters -- and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents showed me the meaning of hard work -- and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. It’s that very spirit that led me to become the first in my family to earn a college degree. And now, it’s the lesson I’m taking with me into the runoff election for Georgia’s Senate seat. **But I can’t do it alone, Derek. We’ve all got to roll up our sleeves and get to work.** I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. It’ll take a tremendous amount of resources, especially when we’re short on time. That’s why I’m asking: **Will you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help keep this seat blue, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats across the nation? We can’t win without the support of this grassroots team.**

clean_body: We have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. | | Derek, I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah, Georgia. I had 11 brothers and sisters -- and while my family was short on money, we were long on love and faith. My parents showed me the meaning of hard work -- and always told us kids we could do anything we put our minds to. It’s that very spirit that led me to become the first in my family to earn a college degree. And now, it’s the lesson I’m taking with me into the runoff election for Georgia’s Senate seat. But I can’t do it alone, Derek. We’ve all got to roll up our sleeves and get to work. I know that we have what it takes to win this race and make history once again here in Georgia. It’ll take a tremendous amount of resources, especially when we’re short on time. That’s why I’m asking: Will you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and the DNC to help keep this seat blue, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats across the nation? We can’t win without the support of this grassroots team. I’ll be honest, Derek: This fight won’t be easy. Until last year, Georgia hadn’t elected a Democratic senator since 1996. And you didn’t just elect one -- you elected two of us! That is the power of this grassroots team. This grassroots team has spent the year supporting Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide and it has paid off. Now, I need your support again. In a race this close, every single vote counts. Thanks for all you do, Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Standing up to corporate power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
While you’re surely seeing lots of ads for holiday sales but still feeling like your holidays are going to be more expensive than ever, remember that big corporations are making record profits—with profit margins the widest they have been since the 1950s.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15499%2E3422442%2EmnpDDL)
Derek, while you’re surely seeing lots of ads for holiday sales but still feeling like your holidays are going to be more expensive than ever, **remember that big corporations are making record profits—with profit margins the widest they have been since the 1950s.**
Corporations have taken advantage of consumers and are continuing to price gouge.
Katie Porter has continuously stood up to corporate special interests, introducing legislation to stop Big Oil’s price gouging and reign in inflation. But we’re up against corporations and their lobbyists–they spent $751 million on lobbying since 2020 to oppose bills that would have lowered costs.
Katie’s proud to reject contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate PACs, and CEOs from Wall Street Banks, Big Pharma, and Big Oil. She works for you, not big corporations. **[Sign on to show your support.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-stop-price-gouging/?source=EMAD23_TAY_20221121_V1_F&t=2&akid=15499%2E3422442%2EmnpDDL)**
**[Sign my name ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-stop-price-gouging/?source=EMAD23_TAY_20221121_V1_F&t=3&akid=15499%2E3422442%2EmnpDDL)**
Team KP

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to update your information, please **[click here.](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em-update-info-footer/?t=4&akid=15499%2E3422442%2EmnpDDL)** Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters chipping in to emails just like this one. If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=15499%2E3422442%2EmnpDDL).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

subject: I know we can keep Georgia blue. Here's how:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221126-RaphaelWarnock-Tandem5ThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221126-RaphaelWarnock-Tandem5ThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=8822%2E9716520%2E2wvcfb)
Hi, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.

Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.

Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.

**But right now, we’re falling about $62,128 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $122 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

**In a race this _neck and neck_ , every single grassroots contribution could mean the difference between winning and losing. **I’m a proud gay man, Japanese American, former teacher, and lifelong Californian.**

My family has faced great hardships — my parents and grandparents were sent to cruel Japanese American internment camps during World War II and lost everything.

As their son and grandson, it is my honor to serve as the first openly LGBTQ+ person of color ever elected to Congress!

But making history didn’t come without its own painful struggles. I was outed as being gay against my will by my opponent when I ran for Congress in 1994.

_I lost that election, but I never gave up hope._

That’s what drives me to continue fighting every day for our progressive movement, and I hope you will join me right now.

[**I’m working to protect our progressive values in Congress everyday -- even with a Republican majority. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: There are still House seats to count, and we're in very good shape in them, including CA-13, where the count could go for another week. The more we can narrow the margin of the Republican majority, the more chaos for Republicans, and the more leverage Democrats have. Can you support a fair count for this important race?
body:
Election count alert
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6cc984a-106b-408f-ba36-6c219d97a3a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | **_UPDATE :_**** ** Republicans currently have 220 House seats--giving them a narrow majority--yet, there are a couple seats left, and we're in good shape in them. _In CA-13, the news is really good news. While Adam Gray's currently trailing by less than 600 votes with 4% left to count, The Washington Post election model says that when all votes are counted they expect Gray to win! So let's make doubly sure Gray has the resources to COUNT EVERY VOTE AND WIN THIS RACE!!_ **[To do this, can you give $5, $10, $25 to Adam Gray so he can pay the staffers and lawyers who are the watchdogs in this effort. Let's take this seat and have an even better holiday season!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58efca88-48cb-4249-9ac9-cb27706ab4ec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_THANK YOU!_**
**_Cliff_** On Fri, Nov 18, 2022 at 9:09 AM Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action <info@mail.blueampaction.com> wrote: Peter, **_At this point: EVERY VOTE COUNTS_** **_218 House votes have been called for Republicans, giving them a one-seat majority in the House of Representatives. But, there are still a half dozen races or so outstanding, and every seat matters. _** **[We need CA-13 and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5acf1e24-b8dc-4302-8c14-5e46a34d2b33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_If Democrats can deny Republicans more than a 1-3 seat majority, it will lead to chaos on the GOP side._One Republican House member, Rep. Don Bacon, has already floated the idea of power-sharing with Democrats.__** **_THIS WOULD BE HUGE. We could get legislation we want put on the House floor this way, to then be ratified by the Senate and signed by Joe Biden. _**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support the CA-13 count!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b50d6a0-c09a-4cc3-ba67-7b72725e1bf4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_One of the races outstanding is California's 13th District. Liberal Democrat Adam Gray is leading conservative Republican, John Duarte, 50.3% to 49.7%. There are still about 30,000 votes left to count. In the areas left to count, there is very good reason to believe we'll pull this off over a Republican in Duarte, who has said he won't work with Democrats in Washington whom he sees as "socialists"_** **[We need this seat and can win it! Let's make sure Adam Gray has the funds necessary for staff& lawyers for what might be a two-week-long count in California. Please join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to (hopefully soon to be Rep.) Adam Gray!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb575dc16-5fd3-443b-bef1-4eaf8d1d67d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thanks Blue Amp Action Community!!**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Connor Boyack
subject: Did you see this?
body:
I’m not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85498ab7cc254763a49d436a30fc1d1f&_e=CRP9OGGm5bWpo6do96U0oKTnYKToBzadvSSd4E11hlcBc4QXkprVHdG2ZmnEdKh7Fh6LZrhNZFGQlbO_r_0k29RloJ71R0UPdzSEixRB-RG94l4lI7mK9s1wwkjWp8OcJBWlvzJc5s9TwUPtRNd8pRhdBmWBc-zhPbJfTT4fxqD74af5nA8VZPo-6cL5mQhCEvXmmyaowBKDG793B4Zyj1TdQJStxQN8-TbneUqBjbBImQNj1s8hv4PkqFM64REGIC7VVCITEL53VJRuouQDw0fPfYAAZ825-jswb7m40wH4d5Sfi3GGeYwjWLrwMZCJFqEFTJEvygjnoomptjotcUnABTNmGBKC9yfC5KyYEdI%3D)
---
| | Hi Friend, I'm not sure if you saw the recent uproar in Dearborn, Michigan, where parents crashed a school board meeting to demand that objectionable books were removed from the library.

The big story behind it all was that Christian parents and Muslim parents had united to demand removal of certain books from their public school library.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85498ab7cc254763a49d436a30fc1d1f&_e=CRP9OGGm5bWpo6do96U0oKTnYKToBzadvSSd4E11hlcBc4QXkprVHdG2ZmnEdKh7Fh6LZrhNZFGQlbO_r_0k29RloJ71R0UPdzSEixRB-RG94l4lI7mK9s1wwkjWp8OcJBWlvzJc5s9TwUPtRNd8pRhdBmWBc-zhPbJfTT4fxqD74af5nA8VZPo-6cL5mQhCEvXmmyaowBKDG793B4Zyjy-JEw9P6_gqr-Bl9RWC8esOPZ3SyXCU8qhP7QOIYh9SXGvFvP5Z9h7XoRxuEER56S9yKGAxfsWNUop_AAgEi3Wb2NkoJLypuS1WcKyA5F8q3XbIrMNTWx--t7-GGOLEsblAaxbA0oy47i39d9dSXcc%3D)
---
| | When I saw it, I couldn't help but ask a slightly different question: who will speak up for which books should be _in _public school libraries?

I'm glad that parents have freedom of speech to protest this--it's one of the best things about our country. And public school libraries matter. It's where kids go to pick books off the shelves that influence them at an early age.

That's why I'm concerned about _putting books into libraries_. If all we do is remove books from libraries, they'll eventually be empty.

But I want to put books into libraries that inspire kids to love liberty, learn more about our amazing country, and learn about classical economics and how the government should work.

A few years ago, these books didn't exist, so I wrote them!

---
| | Now, the Tuttle Twins books have sold millions of copies. But they are largely nonexistent in public school libraries, where so many kids look for their next read.

I'd like to get a set of Tuttle Twins books in every public school library in America. And my friends at Moms for Liberty have stepped up to hand deliver them. Would you like to see a set of Tuttle Twins books in a library near you?

**[_If so, go here and tell me your ZIP code so I can have our friends at Moms for Liberty get a set delivered to a public school near you. _](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85498ab7cc254763a49d436a30fc1d1f&_e=CRP9OGGm5bWpo6do96U0oKTnYKToBzadvSSd4E11hlcBc4QXkprVHdG2ZmnEdKh7Fh6LZrhNZFGQlbO_r_0k29RloJ71R0UPdzSEixRB-RG94l4lI7mK9s1wwkjWp8OcJBWlvzJc5s9TwUPtRNd8pRhdBmWBc-zhPbJfTT4fxqD74af5nA8VZPo-6cL5mQhCEvXmmyaowBKDG793B4Zyj81omKGeOdYQFHjhIILJjQ79OD9EODSt5kGtlqVjqCkIsYzU1jG5Kd_gynHutfEnzof8fXiSsPBskUItW56yMUW5pO7Lg-10HkZKWM26quZ_CopNOOwovPw2IWZnjA9GN3923dszN5YYlncf2MpSv3w%3D)
**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=85498ab7cc254763a49d436a30fc1d1f&_e=CRP9OGGm5bWpo6do96U0oKTnYKToBzadvSSd4E11hlcBc4QXkprVHdG2ZmnEdKh7Fh6LZrhNZFGQlbO_r_0k29RloJ71R0UPdzSEixRB-RG94l4lI7mK9s1wwkjWp8OcJBWlvzJc5s9TwUPtRNd8pRhdBmWBc-zhPbJfTT4fxqD74af5nA8VZPo-6cL5mQhCEvXmmyaowBKDG793B4Zyj3peL8cH99nFFIeP1zjO9OMIeJBR3QFamvbMPEfiJeR4LFNLcSC6MWzAS3EJointNJ30sdw5fpjOVdtUlAwbiw38jh-c2Or2t9617YmEBwmpsq0RFknKkrn-NjDoDVPOymU47NRWMx06y4L2O3s34hE%3D)
---
| | Thanks for your support of this initiative. Let's get better books into libraries for our kids and help them learn to love liberty at a young age. Sincerely,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
Founder, Libertas Institute
---

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f34d633905d44b2980255e5e5b254e1&_e=wmCzmMT_V_4ArJZQSdVSZsQ5pdwp--h08ctqAFHyVZxt-lqkWgv8COCzMf_TXQ1rL_vr76DTvGfnsPm-aKRWYjjwyKWQ_p3de3r_dC7wZuzky0nb-25jn0GTEHzQVfo_L6FCUwKnQBDdghM8fTIHf9Z6oxAcZUT4hIxKj7uU-QfAuaYhk6tasL_u3HsUlDdXMdML3f0aaCTt7NRtZbCupRdA8FhNGV0XdtvDgcxIvsy0GK5edkysyqUqWUuI5TeoUbUe9Q8I65KGK5v4bKI_lYFT2QtqbGZue6d4NpwuoeWVFqPEHiLJbFNI6MSbW4hZ9SNi5NiuZXJbrcb82ZLgHJb5TN-cd59lKUh8Y4dx6npDvT8rS3Dm4svvA5qTP5vnn9cecc6Gc-Zr9TQr4hEaMQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f34d633905d44b2980255e5e5b254e1&_e=wmCzmMT_V_4ArJZQSdVSZsQ5pdwp--h08ctqAFHyVZxt-lqkWgv8COCzMf_TXQ1rL_vr76DTvGfnsPm-aKRWYjjwyKWQ_p3de3r_dC7wZuzky0nb-25jn0GTEHzQVfo_L6FCUwKnQBDdghM8fTIHf9Z6oxAcZUT4hIxKj7uU-QfAuaYhk6tasL_u3HsUlDdXMdML3f0aaCTt7NRtZbCupRdA8FhNGV0XdtvDgcxIvsz_sgpawEbSQHsNF4WcCv3hwZpb1E1FkB4cexqV6fQhn5su1l9gcAt55cbzYdaN0y898c42ANvcKum0GBiR0IahdmNo72sk9lODih2yPNIEgikBTvc09CPyUCqNd_s6UT5_bbcNtSA4XPKRFxiCqffA4DA1r0au7QOmHsc7p08DUQ%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f34d633905d44b2980255e5e5b254e1&_e=wmCzmMT_V_4ArJZQSdVSZsQ5pdwp--h08ctqAFHyVZxt-lqkWgv8COCzMf_TXQ1rL_vr76DTvGfnsPm-aKRWYjjwyKWQ_p3de3r_dC7wZuzky0nb-25jn0GTEHzQVfo_L6FCUwKnQBDdghM8fTIHf9Z6oxAcZUT4hIxKj7uU-QfAuaYhk6tasL_u3HsUlDdXMdML3f0aaCTt7NRtZbCupRdA8FhNGV0XdtvDgcxIvsyD0eB7pmKGECM_m8O8eE1u9xUPp8c1JS3y5HfltrU-1pwR1z1D7wJvmgyz70Y4godd8Ng0BDT2yfhK07QJ1LZu_ocoVRZIuLHTxSmmrkEJz0_168veFA6ReXbz57vi9wnB_OHX1SF3Fb8s8VwosRTi4l-Vm5GsC4frhF0-ir_rPg%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

We’re not going to lie, Peter - this race is going to be tough.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: We have two tasks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963752:JhWqsbGNX:m:1:3253819041:D7478BD0942CB2739CFFBF6CCAE8E058:r)

The country is counting on Georgia. **_It's Georgia or bust, Peter._**

I recently campaigned with Herschel Walker just days after the runoff was announced because it's _that_ important.

No matter where you live, what happens in Georgia's Senate runoff will impact you.

The liberal media is lying to get Raphael Warnock over the finish line. **We cannot let them be successful.** If we can help Herschel Walker win in 10 days, _I know he'll be one of the strongest conservative fighters elected this year._

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963752:JhWqsbGNX:m:1:3253819041:D7478BD0942CB2739CFFBF6CCAE8E058:r)
**[We need EVERYONE reading this email right now to contribute $25, $30, or $50.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963752:JhWqsbGNX:m:1:3253819041:D7478BD0942CB2739CFFBF6CCAE8E058:r)** Herschel was outraised 3 to 1 in the general election, and there is every reason to believe that it could happen again if we don't rally behind Herschel immediately.

The Democrats are spending tens of millions again to attack my friend, Herschel. We have already seen what their fundraising operation can do, so we must fight back IMMEDIATELY.

The stakes are enormous. Herschel will help stop the woke insanity, inflation, crime, and open borders. Raphael Warnock will only be a rubber stamp for the Biden-Schumer agenda.

**[Every one of us must step up before it's too late, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963752:JhWqsbGNX:m:1:3253819041:D7478BD0942CB2739CFFBF6CCAE8E058:r)**

**[Will you join me in standing with Herschel Walker?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61963752:JhWqsbGNX:m:1:3253819041:D7478BD0942CB2739CFFBF6CCAE8E058:r)**

For Freedom,

Ted Cruz

clean_body: We can’t power progress if voters are stripped of their right to use ballot measures. | | Team, We’re reaching out today because we have a chance to double our impact as we prepare for the cycles ahead — = We set our biggest Giving Tuesday fundraising goal ever this year — and while it might seem high, our $10,000 goal will ensure we have the resources necessary to power our work in 2023, 2024, and beyond. A generous donor has offered to match every donation that comes in towards our Giving Tuesday goal up to $5,000! But in order to unlock this 2X Match, we need your help → = = Soon, 2022 will come to a close and the 2023 state legislative sessions are set to begin — and make no mistake: extremist officials are scared. They see the progress we’ve been able to power at the ballot box — especially this November as voters proved they want to see abortion access protected — and now they feel threatened. We’re gearing up for fights ahead as these officials try to restrict the power of ballot measures. That’s where your support and our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign come in. Where we need to litigate, we will litigate. Where we need to run a NO campaign to stop a disastrous measure from reaching the ballot, we will be prepared to do so. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Fairness Project will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’re grateful for your support, Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Here's the rundown: No candidate received 50% of the vote in the Georgia Senate race. clean_body: Senate control is at stake. | Hi Friend, Here's the rundown: No candidate received 50% of the vote in the Georgia Senate race. So on December 6th, in less than 2 weeks, there will be a runoff pitting leftists Raphael Warnock against Conservative fighter Herschel Walker. Senate control now depends on the outcome of this race. If Republicans win this seat, we can start reversing the damage done by Biden's disastrous administration. If Democrats win, we are stuck with 2 more years of a stalemate, letting Democrats spread their woke ideology. | This is not just about Georgia. This race will determine every aspect of your life in the next 2 years. Without your help, we have no chance of taking back the Senate. Any contribution will help spread our conservative message in the next couple of weeks before the runoff. | | ---|---|--- | | Sincerely, Georgia Patriot Alerts Paid for by House Conservatives Trust Copyright (C) 2022 House Conservatives Trust, All rights reserved.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, don’t scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend - I'll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 20 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**

That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker - and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.

**I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We 've done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**

[**_So please, will you split $7 between me and Voter Protection Project - or as much as you can spare today - to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36010?t=6&akid=5519%2E878179%2EOLBkdc)

Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.

- Rev. Raphael Warnock | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/36010?t=7&akid=5519%2E878179%2EOLBkdc)

---
Peter,

Raphael Warnock has more than 900 people on his campaign payroll turning out Democrat voters ahead of Georgia's Senate runoff on December 6th.

Senator Warnock was elected in a runoff race two years ago, so he knows a thing or two about runoff campaigns. **He's instructing the new hires to fan out across Georgia and contact as many Democrats as humanly possible.**

Runoffs are usually low-turnout affairs, so motivating voters to go to the polls is absolutely critical. Senator Warnock believes his staff of 900 will help him beat us in getting-out-the-vote. **That's why it is critical to the success of our campaign to beat his ground game head-on.**

**[Please watch this video I recorded with Senator Graham to update you on our ground game>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61965577:6rnLkbGNL:m:1:3359512271:E197C83378CAA7A2EF08DD228C0590AB:r)**

**How we win:** By making sure every single one of our supporters votes early or on December 6th.
**[Please, if you can, chip in $25 or more today to help us expand our voter turnout operation.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61965577:6rnLkbGNL:m:1:3359512271:E197C83378CAA7A2EF08DD228C0590AB:r)**

[** Help Us Expand Our Ground Game

We MUST flip this seat to keep Democrats from gaining more power. **A 50/50 Senate is infinitely better for the country than a 49/51 Senate where Democrats get anything they want.**

I sincerely hope you'll answer the call.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61965577:6rnLkbGNL:m:1:3359512271:E197C83378CAA7A2EF08DD228C0590AB:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Your post-election priorities survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If you agree that Democrats need to act fast on policies that put us and our communities first, take our quick survey.
#
Peter, Team Jayapal here!
✅ Affordable housing
✅ Reproductive freedom
✅ Paid leave
✅ Universal child care
✅ A roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers
✅ Climate action
✅ Lowering prescription drug prices
✅ Medicare for All
**These are just a _few_ of the issues that were top of mind for voters when they delivered Democrats the best midterm results in decades.**
Pramila is working hard to make sure Democrats follow through on the transformative policies we need. And she’ll keep fighting for them for the rest of this Congress and the next — but she wants to know what you care about most.
So Peter, we wanted to check in with you: **[If you agree that Democrats need to act fast on policies that put us and our communities first, take our quick survey.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/postelection_priorities_survey/?source=em20221126&t=1&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)** **The results of this survey will help guide Pramila’s priorities in the final quarter of 2022.**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/postelection_priorities_survey/?source=em20221126&t=2&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)**
This election proved what we’ve always known here at Team Pramila: Voters turn out when we build a diverse coalition and keep the commitments we make to them – like creating jobs, taking on climate change, and investing in infrastructure.
Now, we’ll keep fighting for working people AND against extremist attacks.
Democrats need to be the party that delivers for the people, period. But to know what we should focus on in the last months of complete Democratic control of Congress, we need to hear from you. **[Will you take our post-election priorities survey today?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/postelection_priorities_survey/?source=em20221126&t=3&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)**
Thanks for making your voice heard on this!
—Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221126-1888-footer&t=4&refcode2=1888_420207_J9DK3H&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=1888%2E420207%2EJ9DK3H)

name: South Bay CRA
subject: SBCRA Nov 28th The Left is trying to Cancel our Meeting
body:
SBCRA MEETING Nov 28th DOORS OPEN@6:30 SHARP El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA South Bay CRA News We need all hands on d
| |
---
|
---
## SBCRA MEETING Nov 28th DOORS OPEN@6:30 SHARP El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
---
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
**We need all hands on deck for our Monthly South Bay CRA meeting. The left is trying to cancel us by complaining about us to the Library staff and threatening to protest our meeting. We need you all to come out in numbers to prove to the City of El Segundo that we will not be pushed around and will not be canceled. Please come and bring friends Monday the 28th door opens at 6:30pm.**
# In other News:
The 14th of November we had an endorsement meeting with delegates from all the clubs in Los Angeles county present. Davina Keiser, Rick Marshall and one other gentleman ( I don't have his name) were endorsed to run for seats on LAGOP board.
# Christmas Party
The South Bay club and the Torrance, Lomita, Palos Verdes club will be holding a joint Christmas party Saturday December 10th 6pm-9pm suggested donation of $10 please also sign up to bring a side dish. Turkey and Ham will be provided. We will be giving out awards and it's also the last day to turn in toys for the outreach we are doing.
**Christmas Party Dec 10th 6pm-9pm Walteria Business Club24004 Neece Ave Torrance, CA**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Nov 28th Monthly Meeting
---
|
---
# Derrick Gates
**Derrick Gates will be talking about cancel culture and the dangers of falling prey to the left's agenda to silence the conservative voices.**
Derrick Gates is a local business owner, film maker, pastor and 2022 CRA endorsed congressional candidate for the CA-36th. Derrick is the president of the New Breed Conservatives an organization dedicated to waking up local churches and get them mobilized to join the fight for our Nation.
|
---
# Mahlone Becker
A graduate of UCLA, Mahlone Becker is the President of the South Bay Rep Women Federated. She spent her career in aviation as the Chief Pilot of Jet Demonstrations for Raytheon. As manufacturers pilot she traveled the world doing demonstration flights for sales. After the birth of her third child it was too much to juggle. Between her piloting career and being present for her child as well as her husband it was overwhelming so she hung up her wings.
As the kids aged she was able to focus on some other activities and became passionate about shotgun shooting. She went on to become an NRA Shotgun instructor and enjoys shooting sporting clay tournaments. She is always happy to share her skills and holds beginning shooting classes from time to time.
---
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
We meet currently at the El Segundo Public Library 111 W Mariposa Ave, El Segundo, CA
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=83340.153.1.a303303faceb749aec8969b82b5ad2d2)
| |
---
---

subject: Georgia’s Senate race is a front in a nationwide struggle against dangerous mainstreaming of fringe racist, misogynist, anti-gay, and anti-Semitic views.
body:
Georgia’s fight is everyone’s fight
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1cbc7b8a-23fb-4e18-99ca-26d7d5a64d42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | [**_$5. $10. $25. These are the kinds of donations that could make the difference between six more years of Senator Raphael Warnock ... or Senator-elect Herschel Walker. Here’s another reason why it matters to the whole country ..._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td72c65bb-ef35-4f09-89c5-1ad99d2f5942/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Donald Trump had a dinner at Mar-a-Lago with anti-Semite Kanye West and Holocaust denier Nick Fuentes. At first Trump tried to deny it, but it's been reported in multiple outlets right down to the specifics of the conversation. _** _**Trump is a close friend, political mentor and supporter of Herschel Walker's, who's made numerous despicably anti-Semitic remarks. Walker's election would further mainstream fringe figures who hold racist, misogynist, anti-gay and anti-Semitic views. It'****s becoming a dangerous threat to inspire more violence, of the kind we've seen most recently in Colorado Springs.**_ **_WALKER’S BRAND OF EXTREMISM PUTS ALL OF OUR FAMILIES IN DANGER._**
---

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Help fight extremism in Georgia!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d8bea23-75bd-43b4-9df7-2f149f149163/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | **_We beat back many of the radicalized figures that Trump elevated from the fringes of US politics earlier this month, candidates such as Kari Lake, Doug Mastriano and Tudor Dixon, to elect Democrats devoted to equality. Now we must do the same to Herschel Walker, so we can keep yet another Democrat, Raphael Warnock, in office, pushing for our goal of full equality for all._** [**_Will you join us in sending Senator Warnock $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to keep Senator Warnock in office and stop hate from having yet another representative in the Senate?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d767c40-f1f8-46d6-a026-509910bc1e15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Thank you for caring about ALL Americans.**
---
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. HORRIBLE: The Georgia GOP passed a law to restrict Vote-by-Mail – slashing the number of voters in the Georgia Run-off Election [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22]
URGENT POLL → [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22] Do you support legislation to guarantee Vote-by-Mail in all 50 states? [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22]YES >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22] NO >> [ https://action.demsofstate.org/a/vbm-poll-nov22]
Here’s the deal.
There’s a VERY important run-off election on December 6th in Georgia that could EXPAND the Democratic Senate Majority.
But Republicans in Georgia and other states strategically pass bills to restrict voters in a pathetic attempt to maintain or expand their power.
Because they know when Democrats are able to easily vote, Democrats win.
We think there should be a federal bill to guarantee Vote-by-Mail in EVERY state. Not just because it’s good for Democrats, but because it’s good for democracy.
That’s why we’re reaching out to Ohio Democrats to see if they agree. We want to see if there’s massive public support for National Vote-by-Mail legislation. We’ll have to submit the results of this poll into the record, so we need your completed response by 11:59PM.

**BREAKING: Raphael Warnock Raised $52 Million**
Peter, that's how much our Democrat opponent raised in the final days of the general election and beginning of the runoff.

**That's a lot of money. He _significantly_ outraised us.**

**Warnock has raised over $153 million for this election cycle!**

There are just 10 days left before the runoff election on Tuesday, December 6th, so we don't have a single hour to spare. We're calling on all conservatives to step up before it's too late. _**[Will you help us close the financial gap immediately?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61969248:JB1VpbGNq:m:1:3371812801:E56F5C5356BE63AD58186FD2EC92B842:r)**_

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. | | Peter, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.

With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55142741/380748783/1583625711?refcode=20221126.5_RW_A31&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYzMGMxNC1lNjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-ocXsHK2vmNGFWh4GwRoKAKYKudyZLzfDQIVJASUcs=)_**

GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

**I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win – but with national Republicans going _all-in_ to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. We've set a goal to raise another $200,000 today so we can fight back against GOP attacks – but we're falling short, and I need your help.**

**_[Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $25 or more now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia so we can win in Georgia and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55142742/380748784/1583625711?refcode=20221126.5_RW_A31&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDYzMGMxNC1lNjZkLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r-ocXsHK2vmNGFWh4GwRoKAKYKudyZLzfDQIVJASUcs=)_** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
